zh.lifeSummary: Sibyl於大約1290年出生在英國諾福爾可格亞特 馬辛加姆。她和Sir John le Strange de Felton至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1346年在英國諾福爾可利其哈姆享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sibyl于大约1290年出生在英国諾福爾可格亞特 馬辛加姆。她和Sir John le Strange de Felton至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1346年在英国諾福爾可利其哈姆享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Sibyl was born about 1290, in Great Massingham, Norfolk, England. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Sir John le Strange de Felton. She died about 1346, in Litcham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Sibyl est née environ 1290, à Great Massingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Sir John le Strange de Felton. Elle est décédée environ 1346, à Litcham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sibyl wurde um 1290 in Great Massingham, Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir John le Strange de Felton mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1346 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Litcham, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sibyl è nata il circa 1290 nel Great Massingham, Norfolk, England. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Sir John le Strange de Felton. Morì circa 1346, nel Litcham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Mitford, Northumberland, England: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォード
ja.Litcham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdo: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクリトチャム

ja.lifeSummary: Sibylは約1290年にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト マシンガムで生まれた。彼女はSir John le Strange de Feltonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1346年にイギリスノーフォルクリトチャムで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl(은)는 대략 1290년 영국 노르폴크 그리트 마징함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John le Strange de Felton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1346년 영국 노르폴크 리트챔에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sibyl nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Great Massingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir John le Strange de Felton. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1346, em Litcham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sibyl родилась около 1290 г. в местности грит массингхам, норфолк, Англия. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Sir John le Strange de Felton. Она умерла около 1346 г. в местности личам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

sm.about 1290–about 1346: e tusa o le 1290–e tusa o le 1346

es.lifeSummary: Sibyl nació aproximadamente 1290, en Great Massingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir John le Strange de Felton. Murió aproximadamente 1346, en Litcham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
